use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation, comments, or user lists
Showing fallback initials or icons when user images fail to load
Representing users in chat interfaces or notification systems
Creating consistent user identity across dashboards and profiles
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with image support and automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. Part of the shadcn/ui design system, following minimalist styling conventions with Tailwind CSS.
